_patch_meta.produced_by: Claude AI — post-VCREPAIR dimension assignment under WA-DimensionReview-Instruction-v1.9
_patch_meta.description: Dimension assignment for two new verse_context_groups created in VCREPAIR: 1613-001 and 1613-002 (H7358 re.chem). Both receive CLAUDE_AI confidence assignments.

record.context_description: Term names the womb as the threshold of human existence over which God exercises sovereign care — the space where divine compassion, calling, and consecration originate before birth
record.notes: New group from VCREPAIR 2026-04-12. God opens, closes, consecrates the womb in all 15 verses. Divine sovereign care at the threshold of creaturely existence. Anchor: Psa 22:10.

operations.description: Insert dimension_index entry for group 1613-001 (H7358 re.chem — divine sovereignty over the womb)

record.context_description: Term names the womb as the origin of human existence — its use in lament and ethical reflection grounds the human person's creaturely condition (suffering, moral nature, shared creatureliness) in the body's most foundational threshold
record.notes: New group from VCREPAIR 2026-04-12. Womb used in lament and ethical reflection. Human creaturely condition grounded in shared womb-origin. Anchor: Job 31:15.

operations.description: Insert dimension_index entry for group 1613-002 (H7358 re.chem — womb as origin of human creaturely condition)
